---
title: "retrauci-plots"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-06-22"
---
```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(knitr)
library(png)
library(grid)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- read.csv2(
  #"C:/Users/user/OneDrive - udl.cat/Desktop/practiques estiu 26/retrauci.csv",
  "C:/Users/Usuari/Desktop/RETRAUCI_rm/RETRAUCI_REPORT/retrauci.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = TRUE
)

colnames(df)
```

#Preprocessing


# 1. Convert dates/times
```{r, echo=FALSE}
date_vars <- c(
  "fecha_trauma", "fecha_ingreso_hospital", "fecha_ingreso_uci",
  "fecha_alta_uci", "fecha_alta_hospital", "fecha_exitus",
  "fecha_reingreso_uci", "fecha_alta_reingreso"
)

time_vars <- c(
  "hora_trauma", "hora_ingreso_hospital",
  "hora_ingreso_uci", "hora_exitus"
)

date_vars <- intersect(date_vars, names(df))
time_vars <- intersect(time_vars, names(df))

df[date_vars] <- lapply(df[date_vars], function(x) {
  parse_date_time(x, orders = c("dmy", "ymd", "dmy HMS", "ymd HMS"))
})

df[time_vars] <- lapply(df[time_vars], function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  parse_date_time(x, orders = c("HMS", "HM", "H M", "I M p"))
})
```

# 2. Convert numeric variables
```{r, echo=FALSE}
numeric_vars <- c(
  "edad", "creatinina_inicial", "creatinina_24h",
  "hemoglobina_inicial", "hemoglobina_24h",
  "hematocrito_inicial", "hematocrito_24h",
  "plaquetas_inicial", "plaquetas_24h",
  "inr_inicial", "inr_24h",
  "protrombina_inicial", "protrombina_24h",
  "ttpa_inicial", "ttpa_24h",
  "fibrinogeno_inicial", "fibrinogeno_24h",
  "ph_inicial", "ph_24h",
  "exceso_base_inicial", "exceso_base_24h",
  "lactico_inicial", "lactico_24h",
  "etanol_cuantitativo_sangre",
  "fc_ph", "fr_ph", "tas_ph",
  "fc_hosp", "fr_hosp", "tas_hosp",
  "gcs_ocular", "gcs_motor", "gcs_verbal",
  "gcs_total_introducido",
  "pto_fr", "pto_tas", "pto_gcs",
  "mais1", "mais2", "mais3", "mais4", "mais5", "mais6",
  "rts_t", "rts", "iss", "niss", "ps",
  "hematies_concentrado", "plasma_bolsas", "plaquetas",
  "ratio_hematies", "ratio_plaquetas",
  "vmec_dias", "traqueotomia_dias",
  "dias_pic", "dias_uci", "dias_hospital",
  "gcs_alta", "rscore_edad", "rscore_aco",
  "rscore_iot_ph", "rscore_mec", "rscore_pupilas",
  "rscore_gcs", "rscore_complicaciones",
  "rscore_ais_cabeza", "rscore_ais_torax",
  "retrascore"
)

gravedad_vars <- grep("^lesion_\\d+_gravedad$", names(df), value = TRUE)

numeric_vars <- c(numeric_vars, gravedad_vars)

numeric_vars <- intersect(numeric_vars, names(df))

df[numeric_vars] <- lapply(df[numeric_vars], function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  x <- gsub(",", ".", x)
  as.numeric(x)
})
```

# 3. Convert categorical variables
```{r, echo=FALSE}
categorical_vars <- setdiff(
  names(df),
  c(date_vars, time_vars, numeric_vars)
)

df[categorical_vars] <- lapply(df[categorical_vars], function(x) {
  factor(trimws(as.character(x)))
})

summary(df$edad)
class(df$edad)
summary(df[, c("registro", "hospital", "edad", "genero", "procedencia")])
```
# 4. Inspect the cleaned dataset
```{r, echo=FALSE}
# Delete poorly introduced patients safely

df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
  if (is.factor(x)) droplevels(x) else x
})

#summary(df)

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

```

#SUMMARY

- 1 GENERAL DATA
- 
- MORTALITY
- 

#GENERAL DATA
```{r, echo=FALSE}
admissions_year <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(fecha_ingreso_uci)) %>%
  mutate(
    year = format(fecha_ingreso_uci, "%Y"),
    mortality = evolucion_uci %in% c("exitus", "exitus y donacion")
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    admissions = n(),
    deaths = sum(mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    mortality_pct = round(100 * deaths / admissions, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

knitr::kable(
  admissions_year,
  col.names = c(
    "Year",
    "Number of admissions",
    "Deaths",
    "Mortality (%)"
  )
)

```
```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    fecha_trauma_date = as.Date(fecha_trauma),
    fecha_ingreso_hospital_date = as.Date(fecha_ingreso_hospital),
    fecha_ingreso_uci_date = as.Date(fecha_ingreso_uci),
    fecha_alta_uci_date = as.Date(fecha_alta_uci),
    fecha_alta_hospital_date = as.Date(fecha_alta_hospital),

    hora_trauma = format(hora_trauma, "%H:%M"),
    hora_ingreso_hospital = format(hora_ingreso_hospital, "%H:%M"),
    hora_ingreso_uci = format(hora_ingreso_uci, "%H:%M"),
    hora_exitus = format(hora_exitus, "%H:%M")
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    trauma_time = strptime(as.character(hora_trauma), "%H:%M"),
    arrival_time = strptime(as.character(hora_ingreso_hospital), "%H:%M"),

    delay_min = as.numeric(difftime(
      arrival_time,
      trauma_time,
      units = "mins"
    )),

    delay_min = ifelse(delay_min < 0, delay_min + 24 * 60, delay_min),

    year = format(fecha_ingreso_uci, "%Y")
  )

delay_year <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(delay_min)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_delay_min = round(mean(delay_min, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_delay_min = round(sd(delay_min, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_delay_min = round(median(delay_min, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    iqr_delay_min = round(IQR(delay_min, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

knitr::kable(
  delay_year,
  col.names = c(
    "Year",
    "N",
    "Mean time trauma-hospital (min)",
    "SD",
    "Median (min)",
    "IQR (min)"
  )
)

ggplot(delay_year, aes(x = year, y = mean_delay_min, group = 1)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean time from trauma to hospital arrival by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean time (minutes)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
delay_year <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(delay_min)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    median_delay = median(delay_min),
    q25 = quantile(delay_min, 0.25),
    q75 = quantile(delay_min, 0.75)
  )

ggplot(delay_year, aes(x = year, y = median_delay, group = 1)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median time from trauma to hospital arrival by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Minutes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(mais1, mais2, mais3, mais4, mais5, mais6),
      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.)))
    )
  )

mais_year <- df %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    MAIS1 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais1 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS1>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais1 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    MAIS2 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais2 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS2>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais2 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    MAIS3 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais3 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS3>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais3 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    MAIS4 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais4 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS4>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais4 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    MAIS5 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais5 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS5>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais5 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    MAIS6 = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais6 > 0, FALSE)), 1),
    `MAIS6>=3` = round(100 * mean(replace_na(mais6 >= 3, FALSE)), 1),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

knitr::kable(mais_year)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
# Asegurar la conversión de la fecha y extracción de períodos
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    fecha_ingreso_uci_date = as.Date(fecha_ingreso_uci),
    year = format(fecha_ingreso_uci_date, "%Y"),
    month = format(fecha_ingreso_uci_date, "%m")
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
heatmap_data <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(month)) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(admissions = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(month_es = factor(c("Enero", "Febrero", "Marzo", "Abril", "Mayo", "Junio", "Julio", "Agosto", "Septiembre", "Octubre", "Noviembre", "Diciembre")[as.numeric(month)],
                           levels = rev(c("Enero", "Febrero", "Marzo", "Abril", "Mayo", "Junio", "Julio", "Agosto", "Septiembre", "Octubre", "Noviembre", "Diciembre"))))

ggplot(heatmap_data, aes(x = year, y = month_es, fill = admissions)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = admissions), size = 3, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#d9ead3", mid = "#ffe599", high = "#e06666", midpoint = 130, name = "Casos") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
trend_data <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(admissions = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(trend_data, aes(x = year, y = admissions, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "#4a76a8", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#4a76a8", size = 3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Frecuencia Absoluta") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(trend_data$admissions) * 1.15)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
hospitals_data <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(hospital), hospital != "") %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(num_hospitals = n_distinct(hospital), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(hospitals_data, aes(x = year, y = num_hospitals, group = 1)) +
  geom_area(fill = "#b4c7e7", color = "#4a76a8", alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Centros participantes", x = NULL, y = "Número de Hospitales") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(hospitals_data$num_hospitals) * 1.2)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10)
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
hospital_cases_annual <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(hospital), hospital != "") %>%
  group_by(year, hospital) %>%
  summarise(admissions = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    class_50 = admissions > 50,
    class_100 = admissions > 100,
    class_150 = admissions > 150
  )

bar_data <- hospital_cases_annual %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    count_50 = sum(class_50, na.rm = TRUE),
    count_100 = sum(class_100, na.rm = TRUE),
    count_150 = sum(class_150, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(count_50, count_100, count_150), names_to = "Classification", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(
    Classification_Group = factor(Classification, levels = c("count_50", "count_100", "count_150"), 
                                labels = c("> 50 casos/año", "> 100 casos/año", "> 150 casos/año"))
  )

ggplot(bar_data, aes(x = year, y = Count, fill = Classification_Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("> 50 casos/año" = "#4a76a8", "> 100 casos/año" = "#ec9a29", "> 150 casos/año" = "#3f9252")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Hospitales (valor absoluto)", fill = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(bar_data$Count) * 1.2)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.justification = "right",
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10)
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
daily_data <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    total_cases = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    days_in_year = ifelse(as.numeric(year) %% 4 == 0, 366, 365),
    mean_daily = total_cases / days_in_year,
    year_num = as.numeric(year)
  )

media_2025 <- round(daily_data$mean_daily[daily_data$year == "2025"], 1)
titulo_dinamico <- paste0("Inclusión diaria 2025: Media ", media_2025, " casos")

ggplot(daily_data, aes(x = year, y = mean_daily, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2, color = "#405263") +
  labs(
    title = titulo_dinamico,
    subtitle = "Media Casos incluidos /día",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(daily_data$mean_daily) * 1.2), breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "#555555", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_time <- df %>%
  mutate(
    iss_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(iss))),
    
    trauma_dt = as.POSIXct(paste(fecha_trauma, hora_trauma), format="%d/%m/%Y %H:%M"),
    uci_dt = as.POSIXct(paste(fecha_ingreso_uci, hora_ingreso_uci), format="%d/%m/%Y %H:%M"),
    
    time_to_uci = as.numeric(difftime(uci_dt, trauma_dt, units = "mins"))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    iss_num >= 15,
    time_to_uci >= 5 & time_to_uci <= 240,
    !is.na(year)
  )

ggplot(df_time, aes(x = year, y = time_to_uci)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    fill = "#5b9bd5", 
    color = "black",
    width = 0.4,
    outlier.shape = NA 
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, 
    y = "Tiempo Trauma--> UCI (min)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_pyramid <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(edad), !is.na(genero), !is.na(year), genero != "") %>%
  mutate(
    edad_num = as.numeric(as.character(edad)),
    genero_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)masculino|hombre|h", genero) ~ "Hombres",
      grepl("(?i)femenino|mujer|m", genero) ~ "Mujeres",
      TRUE ~ "Otros"
    ),
    periodo = ifelse(as.numeric(year) <= 2019, "2015-2019", "2020-2025"),
    grupo_edad = cut(edad_num, 
                     breaks = c(15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65, 70, 75, 80, 85, Inf),
                     labels = c("15-19", "20-24", "25-29", "30-34", "35-39", "40-44", "45-49", 
                                "50-54", "55-59", "60-64", "65-69", "70-74", "75-79", "80-84", "85+"),
                     right = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(grupo_edad), genero_clean %in% c("Hombres", "Mujeres")) %>%
  group_by(periodo, genero_clean, grupo_edad) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(periodo) %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  mutate(prop_plot = ifelse(genero_clean == "Hombres", -prop, prop))

ggplot(df_pyramid, aes(y = grupo_edad)) +
  geom_col(data = filter(df_pyramid, periodo == "2015-2019"), 
           aes(x = prop_plot, fill = genero_clean), alpha = 0.4, color = NA, width = 1) +
  geom_col(data = filter(df_pyramid, periodo == "2020-2025"), 
           aes(x = prop_plot, color = genero_clean), fill = "transparent", size = 1, width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hombres" = "#3b7ebf", "Mujeres" = "#d44e52")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hombres" = "#1e5b96", "Mujeres" = "#a82b2e")) +
  labs(
    title = "Evolución de la Estructura Demográfica",
    subtitle = "Sombras (2015-2019) vs. Contornos (2020-2025)",
    x = "Proporción de Pacientes", y = "Grupo de edad (Años)",
    fill = "Género", color = "Género"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2),
    labels = function(x) paste0(abs(x), "%")
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#555555", size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_bars <- df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(genero), genero != "") %>%
  mutate(
    genero_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)masculino|hombre|h", genero) ~ "masculino",
      grepl("(?i)femenino|mujer|m", genero) ~ "femenino",
      TRUE ~ "otros"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(genero_clean %in% c("masculino", "femenino")) %>%
  group_by(year, genero_clean) %>% 
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_line <- df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  mutate(iss_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(iss)))) %>%
  group_by(year) %>% 
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    graves = sum(iss_num > 15, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_graves = (graves / total) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

max_bar_height <- max(df_line$total, na.rm = TRUE)
coeff <- max_bar_height / 100

ggplot() +
  geom_bar(data = df_bars, aes(x = as.numeric(year), y = count, fill = genero_clean), 
           stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.7, color = "#404040", size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(data = df_line, aes(x = as.numeric(year), y = pct_graves * coeff), 
            color = "#f46a24", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = df_line, aes(x = as.numeric(year), y = pct_graves * coeff), 
             color = "#f46a24", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("masculino" = "#4a7ebb", "femenino" = "#9bbb59")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(as.numeric(df_line$year)), max(as.numeric(df_line$year)), by = 2.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Pacientes (N)",
    limits = c(0, max_bar_height * 1.1),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / coeff, name = "Gravedad (% ISS > 15)", breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 25))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Evolución temporal: Carga asistencial y gravedad",
    subtitle = "Desglose por sexo y porcentaje de pacientes con trauma grave",
    x = "Año de Ingreso", fill = "Sexo"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "#f46a24", face = "bold", angle = 270, vjust = 1.5)
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_mais <- df %>%
  mutate(across(c(mais1, mais2, mais3, mais4, mais5, mais6), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.)))))

calc_mean_sd <- function(x) {
  m <- round(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  s <- round(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  paste0(format(m, nsmall = 2, trim = TRUE), " (DE ", format(s, nsmall = 2, trim = TRUE), ")")
}

res_all <- df_mais %>%
  summarise(across(c(mais1, mais2, mais3, mais4, mais5, mais6), calc_mean_sd)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "MAIS", values_to = "RETRAUCI")

res_2025 <- df_mais %>%
  filter(year == "2025") %>%
  summarise(across(c(mais1, mais2, mais3, mais4, mais5, mais6), calc_mean_sd)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "MAIS", values_to = "2025")

table_mais <- res_all %>%
  left_join(res_2025, by = "MAIS") %>%
  mutate(MAIS = toupper(MAIS)) 

knitr::kable(
  table_mais, 
  caption = "Tendencia evolución patrón lesional"
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_mais_data <- df_mais %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(across(c(mais1, mais2, mais3, mais4, mais5, mais6), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mais"), names_to = "Region", values_to = "Media")

ggplot(plot_mais_data, aes(x = as.numeric(year), y = Media, color = Region)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "mais1" = "#70ad47",
    "mais2" = "#5b9bd5",
    "mais3" = "#ffc000",
    "mais4" = "#a5a5a5",
    "mais5" = "#ed7d31",
    "mais6" = "#4472c4" 
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(as.numeric(plot_mais_data$year)), max(as.numeric(plot_mais_data$year)), by = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, by = 0.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Evolución anual",
    x = NULL, 
    y = NULL, 
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10)
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_violin <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(edad), !is.na(intencionalidad), intencionalidad != "") %>%
  mutate(
    edad_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(edad))),
    
    intencionalidad_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)tráfico|trafico|coche|moto|atropello", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Tráfico",
      grepl("(?i)caída|caida|precipita", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Caída",
      grepl("(?i)laboral|trabajo", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Laboral",
      grepl("(?i)deporte|deportivo|ocio", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Deportivo",
      grepl("(?i)autólisis|autolisis|suicidio", intencionalidad) ~ "Autólisis",
      grepl("(?i)agresión|agresion|arma", intencionalidad) ~ "Agresión",
      TRUE ~ "Otros"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(intencionalidad_clean != "Otros", !is.na(edad_num)) %>%
  mutate(
    intencionalidad_clean = factor(intencionalidad_clean, levels = c(
      "Agresión", 
      "Autólisis", 
      "Accidental: Deportivo", 
      "Accidental: Laboral", 
      "Accidental: Caída", 
      "Accidental: Tráfico"
    ))
  )

ggplot(df_violin, aes(x = edad_num, y = intencionalidad_clean, fill = intencionalidad_clean)) +
  
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, color = "#555555", alpha = 0.85, scale = "width") +
  
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", color = "#333333", outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Accidental: Tráfico" = "#b4c7e7",  
    "Accidental: Caída" = "#2e75b6",   
    "Accidental: Laboral" = "#548235", 
    "Accidental: Deportivo" = "#a9d18e",
    "Autólisis" = "#9e480e",            
    "Agresión" = "#c00000"             
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Accidental: Tráfico" = "#b4c7e7",   
    "Accidental: Caída" = "#2e75b6",     
    "Accidental: Laboral" = "#548235",   
    "Accidental: Deportivo" = "#a9d18e", 
    "Autólisis" = "#a072b9", 
    "Agresión" = "#c00000"               
  )) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(10, 100, by = 10)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Morfología demográfica según edad e intencionalidad",
    subtitle = "Gráfico de violín. Cajas de dispersión",
    x = "Edad del Paciente (Años)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#555555", size = 11),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), 
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_area <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), as.numeric(year) >= 2016, as.numeric(year) <= 2025) %>%
  filter(!is.na(edad), !is.na(genero), !is.na(intencionalidad), genero != "") %>%
  mutate(
    edad_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(edad))),
    
    genero_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)masculino|hombre|h|varón|varon", genero) ~ "Varones",
      grepl("(?i)femenino|mujer|m", genero) ~ "Mujeres",
      TRUE ~ "Otros"
    ),
    
    rango_edad = cut(edad_num, 
                     breaks = c(15, 25, 35, 45, 55, 65, 75, 85, Inf),
                     labels = c("15-24", "25-34", "35-44", "45-54", "55-64", "65-74", "75-84", "85+"),
                     right = FALSE),
    
    intencionalidad_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)tráfico|trafico|coche|moto|atropello", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Tráfico",
      grepl("(?i)caída|caida|precipita", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Caída",
      grepl("(?i)laboral|trabajo", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Laboral",
      grepl("(?i)deporte|deportivo|ocio", intencionalidad) ~ "Accidental: Deportivo",
      grepl("(?i)autólisis|autolisis|suicidio", intencionalidad) ~ "Autólisis",
      grepl("(?i)agresión|agresion|arma", intencionalidad) ~ "Agresión",
      TRUE ~ "Otros"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(genero_clean %in% c("Mujeres", "Varones"), !is.na(rango_edad)) %>%
  
  mutate(
    intencionalidad_clean = factor(intencionalidad_clean, levels = c(
      "Autólisis", 
      "Agresión", 
      "Accidental: Tráfico", 
      "Otros",   
      "Accidental: Laboral", 
      "Accidental: Deportivo", 
      "Accidental: Caída"
    ))
  ) %>%
  
  group_by(genero_clean, rango_edad, intencionalidad_clean) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  group_by(genero_clean, rango_edad) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    pct = n / total,
    rango_edad_num = as.numeric(rango_edad)
  )

ggplot(df_area, aes(x = rango_edad_num, y = pct, fill = intencionalidad_clean)) +
  geom_area(color = "white", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.95) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ genero_clean, ncol = 2) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Accidental: Caída" = "#3b82b6", 
    "Accidental: Deportivo" = "#a9d18e",
    "Accidental: Laboral" = "#4f9a46", 
    "Otros" = "#999999",       
    "Accidental: Tráfico" = "#b8cce4", 
    "Agresión" = "#cb3335",             
    "Autólisis" = "#9d73b8" 
  )) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:8, 
    labels = levels(df_area$rango_edad),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Distribución de la Intencionalidad (Edad y Sexo)",
    subtitle = "Periodo 2016-2025",
    x = "Rango de Edad (Años)",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Intencionalidad"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#404040", size = 11, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#405263", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold", size = 12),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, color = "#555555"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines") # Espacio entre paneles
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3, reverse = TRUE))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_mecanismo <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(mecanismo), mecanismo != "") %>%
  mutate(
    year_num = as.numeric(year),
    
    mec_clean = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)caída|caida", mecanismo) & !grepl("(?i)precipita", mecanismo) ~ "Caída accidental",
      grepl("(?i)precipitaci|precipita", mecanismo) ~ "Precipitación",
      grepl("(?i)moto|motocicleta|ciclomotor", mecanismo) ~ "Moto",
      grepl("(?i)atropello|peatón|peaton", mecanismo) ~ "Atropello",
      grepl("(?i)coche|automóvil|automovil|turismo", mecanismo) ~ "Coche",
      TRUE ~ "Otros (Resto de mecanismos)"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(year_num, mec_clean) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  group_by(year_num) %>%
  mutate(
    total_year = sum(n),
    pct = (n / total_year) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

df_labels_start <- df_mecanismo %>% filter(year_num == min(year_num))
df_labels_end <- df_mecanismo %>% filter(year_num == max(year_num))

ggplot(df_mecanismo, aes(x = year_num, y = pct, color = mec_clean)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  
  geom_text(data = df_labels_start, 
            aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")), 
            vjust = -1, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
            
  geom_text(data = df_labels_end, 
            aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")), 
            hjust = -0.2, vjust = 0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
            
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Caída accidental" = "#20a387", 
    "Moto" = "#e27e31", 
    "Coche" = "#8c80b6",
    "Precipitación" = "#e2388e", 
    "Atropello" = "#73b640", 
    "Otros (Resto de mecanismos)" = "#eeb111" 
  )) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 35), 
    breaks = seq(0, 30, by = 10),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_mecanismo$year_num), max(df_mecanismo$year_num), by = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1)) # 10% de espacio extra a la derecha
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Evolución de los Mecanismos de Trauma Grave en UCI",
    subtitle = "Distribución del peso relativo anual (% real) en la última década (2016-2025)",
    x = "Año de Ingreso",
    y = "Porcentaje del Total Anual (%)",
    color = "Mecanismo Principal"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#555555", size = 11, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "#555555"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linetype = "dashed", color = "#e0e0e0")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 3))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
lesiones_long <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ano = year(fecha_ingreso_uci),
    periodo = case_when(
      ano >= 2015 & ano <= 2024 ~ "2015_2024",
      ano >= 2025 ~ "2025_mas",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(periodo)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^lesion_\\d+_(nombre|gravedad)$"),
    names_to = c("lesion", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(lesion_\\d+)_(nombre|gravedad)"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nombre = str_trim(as.character(nombre)),
    gravedad = as.numeric(as.character(gravedad))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(nombre), nombre != "")

# Comprobación opcional
resumen_gravedad <- lesiones_long %>%
  summarise(
    total_lesiones = n(),
    lesiones_gravedad_menor_3 = sum(gravedad < 3, na.rm = TRUE),
    lesiones_gravedad_3_o_mas = sum(gravedad >= 3, na.rm = TRUE),
    lesiones_gravedad_NA = sum(is.na(gravedad))
  )

kable(resumen_gravedad)

tabla_lesiones_region <- lesiones_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(gravedad), gravedad >= 3) %>%
  mutate(
    region = str_trim(str_extract(nombre, "^[^/]+")),
    region = case_when(
      region %in% c("Craneo", "Cara", "Cuello") ~ "Cabeza",
      TRUE ~ region
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(region), region != "") %>%
  count(region, periodo, name = "n_lesiones") %>%
  group_by(periodo, region) %>%
  summarise(n_lesiones = sum(n_lesiones), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(periodo) %>%
  mutate(
    porcentaje = 100 * n_lesiones / sum(n_lesiones)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = periodo,
    values_from = c(n_lesiones, porcentaje),
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total_n = n_lesiones_2015_2024 + n_lesiones_2025_mas
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_n)) %>%
  select(
    region,
    n_lesiones_2015_2024,
    porcentaje_2015_2024,
    n_lesiones_2025_mas,
    porcentaje_2025_mas
  )

kable(
  tabla_lesiones_region,
  digits = 2,
  col.names = c(
    "Región",
    "N (2015-2024)", "% (2015-2024)",
    "N (2025+)", "% (2025+)"
  )
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
ruta_img <- "C:/Users/user/OneDrive - udl.cat/Desktop/practiques estiu 26/man-icon.png"
ruta_salida <- "C:/Users/user/OneDrive - udl.cat/Desktop/practiques estiu 26/silueta_con_cajas.png"

img <- readPNG(ruta_img)

g <- ggplot() +
  annotation_custom(
    rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE),
    xmin = 0, xmax = 10,
    ymin = 0, ymax = 10
  ) +

  # Cabeza
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 4.5, xmax = 5.5,
           ymin = 7.25, ymax = 8,
           colour = "#4472C4", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Tórax
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 4.4, xmax = 5.6,
           ymin = 6, ymax = 7,
           colour = "#ED7D31", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Abdomen
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 4.3, xmax = 5.8,
           ymin = 5, ymax = 6,
           colour = "#70AD47", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Columna
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 4.8, xmax = 5.2,
           ymin = 5, ymax = 7.2,
           colour = "#7030A0", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Extremidad superior izquierda
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 3.75, xmax = 4.5,
           ymin = 5, ymax = 7.2,
           colour = "#FFC000", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Extremidad superior derecha
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 5.5, xmax = 6.25,
           ymin = 5, ymax = 7.2,
           colour = "#FFC000", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Extremidad inferior izquierda
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 4.4, xmax = 4.9,
           ymin = 2.5, ymax = 5,
           colour = "#A5A5A5", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Extremidad inferior derecha
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 5.1, xmax = 5.6,
           ymin = 2.5, ymax = 5,
           colour = "#A5A5A5", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 10), ylim = c(0, 10), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void()

g
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
ggsave(
  filename = ruta_salida,
  plot = g,
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
tabla_texto <- tabla_lesiones_region %>%
  mutate(
    region_plot = case_when(
      region %in% c("Extemidades Inferiores", "Extremidades Inferiores") ~ "Extremidad inferior",
      region == "Extremidades Superiores" ~ "Extremidad superior",
      region == "Columna Vertebral" ~ "Columna",
      region == "Torax" ~ "Tórax",
      TRUE ~ region
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(region_plot) %>%
  summarise(
    n_lesiones_2015_2024 = sum(n_lesiones_2015_2024, na.rm = TRUE),
    porcentaje_2015_2024 = sum(porcentaje_2015_2024, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_lesiones_2025_mas = sum(n_lesiones_2025_mas, na.rm = TRUE),
    porcentaje_2025_mas = sum(porcentaje_2025_mas, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    orden = case_when(
      region_plot == "Cabeza" ~ 1,
      region_plot == "Tórax" ~ 2,
      region_plot == "Abdomen" ~ 3,
      region_plot == "Columna" ~ 4,
      region_plot == "Extremidad superior" ~ 5,
      region_plot == "Extremidad inferior" ~ 6,
      TRUE ~ 99
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(orden < 99) %>%
  arrange(orden) %>%
  mutate(
    y = seq(8.3, 1.0, length.out = n()),
    texto_2015 = paste0(
      region_plot, "\n",
      n_lesiones_2015_2024, " (", round(porcentaje_2015_2024, 1), "%)"
    ),
    texto_2025 = paste0(
      region_plot, "\n",
      n_lesiones_2025_mas, " (", round(porcentaje_2025_mas, 1), "%)"
    ),
    fill = case_when(
      region_plot == "Cabeza" ~ "#DDEBF7",
      region_plot == "Tórax" ~ "#FCE4D6",
      region_plot == "Abdomen" ~ "#E2F0D9",
      region_plot == "Columna" ~ "#EDE7F6",
      TRUE ~ "#FFF2CC"
    )
  )

g_final <- g +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-5, 15), ylim = c(0, 11), expand = FALSE) +

  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 5,
    y = 10.6,
    label = "Patrón lesional. AIS >=3",
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  annotate(
    "text",
    x = -2.5,
    y = 9.55,
    label = "2015-2024",
    size = 5.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 12.5,
    y = 9.55,
    label = "2025+",
    size = 5.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  geom_label(
    data = tabla_texto,
    aes(x = -2.5, y = y, label = texto_2015, fill = fill),
    colour = "black",
    label.size = 0,
    label.padding = unit(0.35, "lines"),
    label.r = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    size = 4.2,
    fontface = "plain",
    lineheight = 0.9
  ) +

  geom_label(
    data = tabla_texto,
    aes(x = 12.5, y = y, label = texto_2025, fill = fill),
    colour = "black",
    label.size = 0,
    label.padding = unit(0.35, "lines"),
    label.r = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    size = 4.2,
    fontface = "plain",
    lineheight = 0.9
  ) +

  scale_fill_identity()

g_final
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df_tabla <- df %>%
  mutate(
    is_25 = (!is.na(year) & year == "2025"),
    is_retra = (!is.na(year) & year != "2025"),
    
    procedencia = ifelse(is.na(procedencia) | procedencia == "", "Desconocido", as.character(procedencia)),
    intencionalidad = ifelse(is.na(intencionalidad) | intencionalidad == "", "Desconocido", as.character(intencionalidad)),
    mecanismo = ifelse(is.na(mecanismo) | mecanismo == "", "Desconocido", as.character(mecanismo)),
    
    edad_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(edad))),
    edad_cat = case_when(
      is.na(edad_num) ~ "Desconocido",
      edad_num <= 49 ~ "- \U2264 49 años",
      edad_num >= 50 & edad_num <= 65 ~ "- 50-65 años",
      edad_num >= 66 & edad_num <= 75 ~ "- 66-75 años",
      edad_num > 75 ~ "- > 75 años"
    )
  )


tot_retra <- sum(df_tabla$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
tot_25 <- sum(df_tabla$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

generar_filas_fix <- function(data, variable, ordenar_desc = FALSE) {
  
  sum_retra <- data %>% filter(is_retra) %>% count(!!sym(variable), name = "n_retra")
  sum_25 <- data %>% filter(is_25) %>% count(!!sym(variable), name = "n_25")
  
  merged <- full_join(sum_retra, sum_25, by = variable) %>%
    replace_na(list(n_retra = 0, n_25 = 0))
  
  if (ordenar_desc) {
    merged <- merged %>% arrange(!!sym(variable) == "Desconocido", desc(n_retra))
  }
  
  merged %>%
    mutate(
      # % calculado sobre el total de pacientes del grupo (no sobre los que tienen la variable rellena)
      pct_retra = (n_retra / tot_retra) * 100,
      pct_25 = (n_25 / tot_25) * 100,
      RETRAUCI = paste0(n_retra, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_retra)), "%)"),
      `2025` = paste0(n_25, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_25)), "%)"),
      Variable = as.character(!!sym(variable))
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, RETRAUCI, `2025`)
}

row_pacientes <- tibble(Variable = "**Nº Pacientes**", RETRAUCI = as.character(tot_retra), `2025` = as.character(tot_25))

n_muj_retra <- sum(grepl("(?i)femenino|mujer|m", df_tabla$genero) & df_tabla$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
n_hom_retra <- sum(grepl("(?i)masculino|hombre|h|varón|varon", df_tabla$genero) & df_tabla$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
n_muj_25 <- sum(grepl("(?i)femenino|mujer|m", df_tabla$genero) & df_tabla$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)
n_hom_25 <- sum(grepl("(?i)masculino|hombre|h|varón|varon", df_tabla$genero) & df_tabla$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

row_sexo <- tibble(
  Variable = "**Sexo (Mujeres/Hombres)**",
  RETRAUCI = paste0("(", n_muj_retra, "/", n_hom_retra, ")"),
  `2025` = paste0("(", n_muj_25, "/", n_hom_25, ")")
)

tabla_final <- bind_rows(
  row_pacientes,
  tibble(Variable = "**Edad**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = ""), generar_filas_fix(df_tabla, "edad_cat"),
  row_sexo,
  tibble(Variable = "**Procedencia**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = ""), generar_filas_fix(df_tabla, "procedencia", TRUE),
  tibble(Variable = "**Intencionalidad**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = ""), generar_filas_fix(df_tabla, "intencionalidad", TRUE),
  tibble(Variable = "**Mecanismos**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = ""), generar_filas_fix(df_tabla, "mecanismo", TRUE)
)

knitr::kable(tabla_final, col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), align = c("l", "c", "c"))
```
```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df_t1 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    is_25 = (!is.na(year) & year == "2025"),
    is_retra = (!is.na(year) & year != "2025"),

    is_contuso = grepl("(?i)contuso|cerrado", tipo_trauma),
    is_penetrante = grepl("(?i)penetrante|abierto", tipo_trauma),

    is_anti = grepl("(?i)1|si|s|true|positivo", antiagregado) & !is.na(antiagregado) & antiagregado != "",
    is_dicu = grepl("(?i)1|si|s|true|positivo", dicumarinicos) & !is.na(dicumarinicos) & dicumarinicos != "",
    is_acod = grepl("(?i)1|si|s|true|positivo", acod) & !is.na(acod) & acod != "",

    is_none_farm = !(is_anti | is_dicu | is_acod),

    aten_pre = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)uvi|medicalizada|samu", atencion_prehospitalaria) & !grepl("(?i)no", atencion_prehospitalaria) ~ "- UVI móvil",
      grepl("(?i)helic|aereo", atencion_prehospitalaria) ~ "- Helicóptero",
      grepl("(?i)no medicalizada|basico|svb", atencion_prehospitalaria) ~ "- No medicalizada",
      grepl("(?i)sin atencion|propios", atencion_prehospitalaria) ~ "- Sin atención prehospitalaria",
      grepl("(?i)enfermer|sve", atencion_prehospitalaria) ~ "- Soporte Vital Enfermería",
      TRUE ~ "- Desconocido"
    )
  )

make_row <- function(var_name, count_retra, den_retra, count_25, den_25) {
  pct_retra <- ifelse(den_retra > 0, (count_retra / den_retra) * 100, 0)
  pct_25 <- ifelse(den_25 > 0, (count_25 / den_25) * 100, 0)
  
  val_retra <- paste0(count_retra, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_retra)), "%)")
  val_25 <- paste0(count_25, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_25)), "%)")
  
  tibble(Variable = var_name, RETRAUCI = val_retra, `2025` = val_25)
}

tot_retra <- sum(df_t1$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
tot_25 <- sum(df_t1$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

row_pacientes <- tibble(Variable = "**Nº Pacientes**", RETRAUCI = as.character(tot_retra), `2025` = as.character(tot_25))

den_trauma_retra <- sum((df_t1$is_contuso | df_t1$is_penetrante) & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
den_trauma_25 <- sum((df_t1$is_contuso | df_t1$is_penetrante) & df_t1$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

head_trauma <- tibble(Variable = "**Tipo de trauma**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = "")
r_contuso <- make_row("- Contuso", sum(df_t1$is_contuso & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), den_trauma_retra, sum(df_t1$is_contuso & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), den_trauma_25)
r_pene <- make_row("- Penetrante", sum(df_t1$is_penetrante & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), den_trauma_retra, sum(df_t1$is_penetrante & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), den_trauma_25)

head_farmacos <- tibble(Variable = "**Consumo de antiagregantes o anticoagulantes**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = "")
r_none <- make_row("- No constan", sum(df_t1$is_none_farm & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), tot_retra, sum(df_t1$is_none_farm & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), tot_25)
r_anti <- make_row("- Antiagregados", sum(df_t1$is_anti & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), tot_retra, sum(df_t1$is_anti & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), tot_25)
r_dicu <- make_row("- Dicumarínicos", sum(df_t1$is_dicu & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), tot_retra, sum(df_t1$is_dicu & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), tot_25)
r_acod <- make_row("- ACOD", sum(df_t1$is_acod & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), tot_retra, sum(df_t1$is_acod & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), tot_25)

head_prehosp <- tibble(Variable = "**Atención prehospitalaria**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = "")
cats_pre <- c("- UVI móvil", "- Helicóptero", "- No medicalizada", "- Sin atención prehospitalaria", "- Soporte Vital Enfermería", "- Desconocido")

rows_prehosp <- bind_rows(lapply(cats_pre, function(c) {
  make_row(c, sum(df_t1$aten_pre == c & df_t1$is_retra, na.rm=T), tot_retra, sum(df_t1$aten_pre == c & df_t1$is_25, na.rm=T), tot_25)
}))

tabla1_final <- bind_rows(
  row_pacientes,
  head_trauma, r_contuso, r_pene,
  head_farmacos, r_none, r_anti, r_dicu, r_acod,
  head_prehosp, rows_prehosp
)

knitr::kable(tabla1_final, col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), align = c("l", "l", "l"))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df_t2 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    is_25 = (!is.na(year) & year == "2025"),
    is_retra = !is_25, 
    
    tce_str = as.character(tce),

    tce_cl = case_when(
      grepl("(?i)difusa.*iii|tipo 3|tipo iii", tce_str) | tce_str == "3" ~ "- Les Difusa Tipo III (sweling difuso): no lesión masa y cisternas comprimidas o ausentes",
      grepl("(?i)difusa.*iv|tipo 4|tipo iv", tce_str) | tce_str == "4" ~ "- Les Difusa Tipo IV (sweling hemisférico): no lesión, desviación LM > 5mm",
      grepl("(?i)difusa.*ii|tipo 2|tipo ii", tce_str) | tce_str == "2" ~ "- Les Difusa Tipo II: sin lesión masa >25 cc, con cisternas presentes, línea media (LM) < 6 mm",
      grepl("(?i)difusa.*i\\b|tipo 1|tipo i\\b", tce_str) | tce_str == "1" ~ "- Les Difusa Tipo I: sin lesión intracraneal visible",
      grepl("(?i)no evacuada|tipo 6|tipo vi", tce_str) | tce_str == "6" ~ "- Les Masa no Evacuada (Tipo VI): lesión masa > 25 cc no operada",
      grepl("(?i)evacuada|tipo 5|tipo v\\b", tce_str) | tce_str == "5" ~ "- Les Masa Evacuada (Tipo V): cualquier lesión evacuada quirúrgicamente",

      TRUE ~ "- No TCE"
    )
  )

make_row_tce <- function(var_name, count_retra, den_retra, count_25, den_25) {
  pct_retra <- ifelse(den_retra > 0, (count_retra / den_retra) * 100, 0)
  pct_25 <- ifelse(den_25 > 0, (count_25 / den_25) * 100, 0)
  
  val_retra <- paste0(count_retra, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_retra)), "%)")
  val_25 <- paste0(count_25, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_25)), "%)")
  
  tibble(Variable = var_name, RETRAUCI = val_retra, `2025` = val_25)
}

tot_retra <- sum(df_t2$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
tot_25 <- sum(df_t2$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

cats_tce <- c(
  "- No TCE", 
  "- Les Difusa Tipo I: sin lesión intracraneal visible", 
  "- Les Difusa Tipo II: sin lesión masa >25 cc, con cisternas presentes, línea media (LM) < 6 mm",
  "- Les Difusa Tipo III (sweling difuso): no lesión masa y cisternas comprimidas o ausentes",
  "- Les Difusa Tipo IV (sweling hemisférico): no lesión, desviación LM > 5mm",
  "- Les Masa Evacuada (Tipo V): cualquier lesión evacuada quirúrgicamente",
  "- Les Masa no Evacuada (Tipo VI): lesión masa > 25 cc no operada"
)

rows_tce <- bind_rows(lapply(cats_tce, function(cat) {
  # Filtramos usando un simple & lógico para mayor seguridad
  count_r <- sum(df_t2$tce_cl == cat & df_t2$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
  count_2 <- sum(df_t2$tce_cl == cat & df_t2$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)
  make_row_tce(cat, count_r, tot_retra, count_2, tot_25)
}))

head_tce <- tibble(Variable = "**TCE**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = "")
tabla_tce_final <- bind_rows(head_tce, rows_tce)

knitr::kable(
  tabla_tce_final, 
  caption = "Codificación de lesiones", 
  col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), 
  align = c("l", "l", "l")
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df_t3 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    is_25 = (!is.na(year) & year == "2025"),
    is_retra = !is_25,
    
    iss_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(iss))),
    rts_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(rts))),
    ps_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(ps))), # TRISS(PS)
    retra_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(retrascore))),
    
    iss_cat = case_when(
      iss_num <= 15 ~ "- ISS \U2264 15",
      iss_num >= 16 & iss_num <= 24 ~ "- ISS 16-24",
      iss_num >= 25 ~ "- ISS \U2265 25",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

make_row_iss <- function(var_name, count_retra, den_retra, count_25, den_25) {
  pct_retra <- ifelse(den_retra > 0, (count_retra / den_retra) * 100, 0)
  pct_25 <- ifelse(den_25 > 0, (count_25 / den_25) * 100, 0)
  
  val_retra <- paste0(count_retra, "(", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_retra)), "%)")
  val_25 <- paste0(count_25, "(", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_25)), "%)")
  
  tibble(Variable = var_name, RETRAUCI = val_retra, `2025` = val_25)
}

calc_stats_combined <- function(data, variable, is_25_flag) {
  if (is_25_flag) {
    x <- data[[variable]][data$is_25]
  } else {
    x <- data[[variable]][data$is_retra]
  }
  
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  
  if (length(x) == 0) return("")
  
  m_mean <- mean(x)
  s_sd <- sd(x)
  med <- median(x)
  q25 <- quantile(x, 0.25)
  q75 <- quantile(x, 0.75)
  
  format_num <- function(num) { gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", num)) }
  format_iqr <- function(num) { ifelse(num %% 1 == 0, as.character(num), format_num(num)) }
  
  line1 <- paste0(format_num(m_mean), "(DE ", format_num(s_sd), ")")
  line2 <- paste0(format_iqr(med), "(IQR ", format_iqr(q25), "-", format_iqr(q75), ")")
  
  paste0(line1, " <br> ", line2)
}

tot_retra <- sum(df_t3$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
tot_25 <- sum(df_t3$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

den_iss_retra <- sum(!is.na(df_t3$iss_cat) & df_t3$is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
den_iss_25 <- sum(!is.na(df_t3$iss_cat) & df_t3$is_25, na.rm = TRUE)

row_pacientes_scores <- tibble(Variable = "", RETRAUCI = as.character(tot_retra), `2025` = as.character(tot_25))

head_iss <- tibble(Variable = "**ISS**", RETRAUCI = "", `2025` = "")
r_iss1 <- make_row_iss("- ISS \U2264 15", sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS \U2264 15" & df_t3$is_retra, na.rm=T), den_iss_retra, sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS \U2264 15" & df_t3$is_25, na.rm=T), den_iss_25)
r_iss2 <- make_row_iss("- ISS 16-24", sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS 16-24" & df_t3$is_retra, na.rm=T), den_iss_retra, sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS 16-24" & df_t3$is_25, na.rm=T), den_iss_25)
r_iss3 <- make_row_iss("- ISS \U2265 25", sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS \U2265 25" & df_t3$is_retra, na.rm=T), den_iss_retra, sum(df_t3$iss_cat == "- ISS \U2265 25" & df_t3$is_25, na.rm=T), den_iss_25)

row_rts <- tibble(
  Variable = "**RTS**", 
  RETRAUCI = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "rts_num", FALSE),
  `2025` = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "rts_num", TRUE)
)

row_triss <- tibble(
  Variable = "**TRISS (PS)**", 
  RETRAUCI = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "ps_num", FALSE),
  `2025` = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "ps_num", TRUE)
)

row_retrascore <- tibble(
  Variable = "**RETRASCORE**", 
  RETRAUCI = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "retra_num", FALSE),
  `2025` = calc_stats_combined(df_t3, "retra_num", TRUE)
)

tabla_gravedad_final <- bind_rows(
  row_pacientes_scores,
  head_iss, r_iss1, r_iss2, r_iss3,
  row_rts,
  row_triss,
  row_retrascore
)

knitr::kable(
  tabla_gravedad_final, 
  caption = "Índices de gravedad", 
  col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), 
  align = c("l", "l", "l"), 
  escape = FALSE
)
```



```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
is_25 <- (!is.na(df$year) & df$year == "2025")
is_retra <- (!is.na(df$year) & df$year != "2025")

generar_seccion_qx <- function(nombre_fila, var_col) {
  tot_r <- sum(df[[var_col]] %in% c(1,2,3) & is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
  tot_2 <- sum(df[[var_col]] %in% c(1,2,3) & is_25, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cabecera <- tibble(V = paste0("**", nombre_fila, "**"), R = as.character(tot_r), Y = as.character(tot_2))
  
  filas <- lapply(c(1, 2, 3), function(cat) {
    c_r <- sum(df[[var_col]] == cat & is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
    c_2 <- sum(df[[var_col]] == cat & is_25, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    pct_r <- ifelse(tot_r > 0, (c_r/tot_r)*100, 0)
    pct_2 <- ifelse(tot_2 > 0, (c_2/tot_2)*100, 0)
    
    tibble(V = paste0("  ", cat), 
           R = paste0(c_r, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_r)), "%)"),
           Y = paste0(c_2, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_2)), "%)"))
  })
  
  bind_rows(cabecera, bind_rows(filas))
}

tabla_recursos_final <- bind_rows(
  tibble(V = "**Cirugías urgentes (primeras 24h)**", R = as.character(sum(is_retra)), Y = as.character(sum(is_25))),
  
  generar_seccion_qx("Neurocirugía", "qx_neuro"),
  generar_seccion_qx("Maxilofacial", "qx_maxilo"),
  generar_seccion_qx("Cardiotorácica", "qx_cardiotoracica"),
  generar_seccion_qx("Cirugía abdominal", "qx_abdominal"),
  generar_seccion_qx("Cirugía ortopédica", "qx_trauma"),
  generar_seccion_qx("Otras cirugías", "qx_otras")
)

knitr::kable(tabla_recursos_final, col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), align = "lll")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#NO ESTÁ BIEN
# Definición de periodos (excluyendo 2025 para RETRAUCI)
is_25 <- (!is.na(df$year) & df$year == "2025")
is_retra <- (!is.na(df$year) & df$year != "2025")

# 1. Función para variables categóricas (ej: Transfusión, Ventilación, Traqueotomía)
calc_cat <- function(var_col, cat_val, label) {
  # Filtramos por valor (usamos 0/1, Si/No, etc. según tus datos)
  c_r <- sum(df[[var_col]] == cat_val & is_retra, na.rm = TRUE)
  c_2 <- sum(df[[var_col]] == cat_val & is_25, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  pct_r <- (c_r / sum(is_retra)) * 100
  pct_2 <- (c_2 / sum(is_25)) * 100
  
  tibble(V = paste0("  ", label), 
         R = paste0(c_r, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_r)), "%)"),
         Y = paste0(c_2, " (", gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", pct_2)), "%)"))
}

# 2. Función para variables continuas (ej: Días de VM)
calc_cont <- function(var_col) {
  x_r <- as.numeric(df[[var_col]][is_retra]) %>% na.omit()
  x_2 <- as.numeric(df[[var_col]][is_25]) %>% na.omit()
  
  fmt <- function(v) gsub("\\.", ",", sprintf("%.1f", v))
  
  l1 <- paste0(fmt(mean(x_r)), "(DE ", fmt(sd(x_r)), ")")
  l2 <- paste0(fmt(median(x_r)), "(IQR ", fmt(quantile(x_r, 0.25)), "-", fmt(quantile(x_r, 0.75)), ")")
  
  l1_2 <- paste0(fmt(mean(x_2)), "(DE ", fmt(sd(x_2)), ")")
  l2_2 <- paste0(fmt(median(x_2)), "(IQR ", fmt(quantile(x_2, 0.25)), "-", fmt(quantile(x_2, 0.75)), ")")
  
  tibble(V = paste0("  ", "Media/Mediana"), R = paste0(l1, " <br> ", l2), Y = paste0(l1_2, " <br> ", l2_2))
}

# 3. Ensamblado de toda la tabla
tabla_recursos_full <- bind_rows(
  # Transfusión
  tibble(V = "**Transfusión de hemoderivados**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cat("hematies_concentrado", 0, "No"),
  calc_cat("hematies_concentrado", 1, "Si"),
  
  # Ventilación mecánica
  tibble(V = "**Ventilación mecánica**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cat("vmec_dico", 0, "No"),
  calc_cat("vmec_dico", 1, "Si"),
  tibble(V = "**Días de VM (días)**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cont("vmec_dias"),
  
  # Traqueotomía
  tibble(V = "**TRAQUEOTOMÍA**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cat("traqueotomia", 0, "No"),
  calc_cat("traqueotomia", 1, "Si"),
  
  # Arteriografía
  tibble(V = "**Arteriografía**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cat("arteriografia", 0, "No"),
  calc_cat("arteriografia", 1, "Sí diagnóstica"),
  calc_cat("arteriografia", 2, "Sí Terapéutica"),
  
  # Terapia renal
  tibble(V = "**Terapia renal (TRRC)**", R = "", Y = ""),
  calc_cat("terapia_renal", 0, "No"),
  calc_cat("terapia_renal", 1, "Si")
)

# Renderizado final
knitr::kable(tabla_recursos_full, col.names = c("", "RETRAUCI", "2025"), align = "lll", escape = FALSE)
```
